$comment: Overlay for MSYS: Removes boost-cmake dependency to avoid circular dependency
Original issue: boost-assert needs boost-cmake's BoostConfig.cmake during build
but boost-cmake hasn't finished building yet, causing circular dependency
name: boost-assert

dependencies.$comment: boost-cmake removed to avoid circular dependency for MSYS
MSYS builds with boost-cmake installed as a transitive dependency
dependencies.name: boost-config
